name: send_email
description: Create and send a new email to your Buttondown subscribers. You can send immediately or save as a draft. The body supports markdown formatting. You can also schedule the email for a future date.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: The subject line of the email.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The email body content in markdown format.
parameters.example:
# Hello subscribers

Here's what happened this week...

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Set to 'draft' to save without sending, or 'about_to_send' to send immediately. Default is 'about_to_send'.

parameters.name: publish_date
parameters.description: ISO 8601 datetime to schedule the email for future delivery.

body.subject: This Week in Tech #42
body.body:
# Hello subscribers

Here's what happened this week...

body.subject: This Week in Tech #42
body.body:
# Hello subscribers

Here's what happened this week...
